name: Churu Pops Cat Treat - Tuna with Chicken Recipe
description: Treat your cat to Churu Pops Tuna with Chicken , the soft, juicy jelly snack that cats can’t resist! Crafted from high-quality farm-raised chicken and natural wild-caught tuna , these treats are packed with 91% moisture to help keep your kitty hydrated and healthy. Why Cats Love Churu Pops: Moist and irresistible: Creamy, squeezable jelly treats perfect for hand-feeding. Healthy & low-calorie: Only 6.5 calories per treat, free from grains, artificial colors, and preservatives. Immune-supporting: Enriched with Vitamin E to promote a strong immune system. Fun and interactive: Feed directly from the tube for a playful bonding experience. Available in multiple savory flavors, Churu Pops are suitable for cats of all life stages—from playful kittens to senior cats. Feeding Instructions: Feed as a treat. Not a substitute for meals. Provide fresh water daily. Consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions: Refrigerate after opening and serve promptly. Ingredients: Water, Tuna, Chicken, Natural Flavors, Agar-agar, Guar Gum, Natural Tuna Flavor, Xanthan Gum, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract.
